basic_details.job_title: DHS Lakshadweep Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Specialist Doctors, GDMO and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of Health Services, UT of Lakshadweep
basic_details.short_information: The Directorate of Health Services, Union Territory of Lakshadweep has invited applications for the recruitment of Specialist Doctors, GDMO, and Dental Surgeon on a contractual basis. This is a golden opportunity for medical professionals to serve in the beautiful islands of Lakshadweep. The last date to submit applications through the Google Form is 24 July 2026 (6:00 PM). Find complete details including vacancy breakup, remuneration, eligibility, and application process below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated later via email/mobile

qualification.details: Candidates must possess the prescribed qualifications as mentioned in the vacancy table. Appointment is purely on contract basis for 11 months and likely to be extended based on performance and requirement. Selected candidates will be posted in various islands of Lakshadweep as per the need of the department. No TA/DA will be provided for appearing in the interview.

how_to_apply: Visit the provided Google Form link or scan the QR code given in the official advertisement.
Fill all the required details carefully.
Upload necessary documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, registration certificates, etc.).
Submit the application on or before 24 July 2026 (6:00 PM).
Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview schedule through email or mobile number.
important_instructions: Applications received after the due date will not be considered. The selection will be based on interview and academic records. This is contractual employment. No claim for regular appointment will be entertained. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For any queries, candidates may contact the Directorate of Health Services, Kavaratti.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Lakshadweep Doctors Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online application is 24 July 2026 (6:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in Lakshadweep Health Services 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 18 contractual posts including Specialists, GDMO, and Dental Surgeon.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary of Cardiologist in Lakshadweep contractual recruitment?
faq.answer: Selected Cardiologist will get Rs. 5,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for GDMO post in Lakshadweep?
faq.answer: Candidates must have MBBS degree for GDMO positions (11 posts).

faq.question: Q5. Is the appointment in Lakshadweep permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: All posts are on purely contractual basis for 11 months (extendable).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Lakshadweep Specialist Doctors & GDMO posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted through the official Google Form link provided in the advertisement.

faq.question: Q7. What is the remuneration for Dental Surgeon in Lakshadweep?
faq.answer: Dental Surgeon will receive Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Will interview be conducted for Lakshadweep Doctors selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Date and link will be shared later.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age limit mentioned for Lakshadweep contractual doctor posts?
faq.answer: No specific age limit is mentioned in the advertisement.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the Google Form link for Lakshadweep Health Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The link is available in the official advertisement: https://forms.gle/i5k11jqzggdxxcSzD6
